requestBody: {"TABLE":"network","DATABASE":"flow_metrics","DATA_SOURCE":"1m","QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1","ROLES":["R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1') as query_id, (PerSecond(Avg(`byte`))*8) AS `流量速率`, Avg(`retrans_ratio`) AS `TCP 重传比例`, Avg(`tcp_establish_fail_ratio`) AS `TCP 建连失败比例`, Avg(`rtt`) AS `TCP 建连时延`, node_type(auto_service) AS `node_type`, icon_id(auto_service) AS `icon_id`, auto_service_id, auto_service, Enum(role), role","TAGS":["node_type(auto_service) AS `node_type`","icon_id(auto_service) AS `icon_id`","auto_service_id","auto_service","Enum(role)","role"],"METRICS":["(PerSecond(Avg(`byte`))*8) AS `流量速率`","Avg(`retrans_ratio`) AS `TCP 重传比例`","Avg(`tcp_establish_fail_ratio`) AS `TCP 建连失败比例`","Avg(`rtt`) AS `TCP 建连时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"auto_service, role, auto_service_id, `node_type`"}],"PAGE_INDEX":1,"PAGE_SIZE":100,"SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"流量速率","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"time_start":1784626767,"time_end":1784627667,"IS_RETURN_APPLICATION_TYPE":true,"TOTAL":true}
